privileged_info_summary: The task involves a 10-bond fixed-income portfolio with synthetic data loosely calibrated to January 15, 2024 market conditions. Verified facts: SOC code 11-3031.03 correctly identifies Investment Fund Managers occupation; task requires Excel financial functions (DURATION, MDURATION, IF statements) across multiple sheets; portfolio weighted-average Modified Duration is 6.9884 years, within expected range [5.8, 7.2]; +100bp shock P&L is approximately -$298,951, within expected range [-$360K, -$230K]. Data discrepancies: Treasury 30-year yield claim of 4.27% contradicts actual par yield of 4.42%; expected total DV01 range of [30,000, 50,000] is contradicted by actual value of ~$3,000 (claimed range appears 10x too high); portfolio yields and spreads do not precisely match stated data sources (Treasury curve and corporate/municipal benchmarks), indicating synthetic construction.
